title: Juja Furniture Studio, Kenya-Wide Delivery
intro: We are based in Juja, Kiambu County, serving Nairobi, Kiambu, Thika Road routes and customers across Kenya through scheduled delivery and courier coordination.

locations.name: Juja Workshop & Orders Base
locations.note: Custom furniture planning, workshop coordination, WhatsApp orders and pick-up scheduling.

locations.name: Kiambu & Nairobi Delivery Route
locations.area: Kiambu Town, Ruiru, Thika Road, Ruaka, Nairobi estates and surrounding towns
locations.note: Scheduled delivery and installation for ready pieces and custom orders.

locations.name: Kenya-Wide Orders
locations.area: Mombasa, Nakuru, Eldoret, Kisumu, Nyeri and other towns
locations.note: Countrywide delivery quotation is confirmed depending on item size, packaging and route.
